title: Mary Poorman
compiled_truth: Mary Poorman is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-29 to 2001-06-01), Mary Poorman sent 109 and received 178 emails, totalling 287 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (98), [Pat Clynes](people/pat-clynes) (34), [Robert Cotten](people/robert-cotten) (30), [Edward Terry](people/edward-terry) (29), [Tom Acton](people/tom-acton) (21). Mailbox folders observed: industrials, logistics, pan_energy_swap, wellhead.
